name: Kabata Transportation Inc
districts_or_customers: Northwest Area School District (Shickshinny, Luzerne County PA)
recent_news: Founder Raymond Kabata passed away Feb 3, 2023 (age 68) after battle with Parkinson's; he had managed the company and the family farm. Active USDOT #1860700, ~625,000 miles in 2025.
fit_notes: Strong tuck-in candidate: family-owned PA (Summit core state) contractor for Northwest Area SD with HIGH succession signal — founder died 2023 leaving heirs running the business. Sub-scale (~25 buses) but clean single-district relationship in rural Luzerne County is a textbook Summit bolt-on profile.
